title: Crispy Bitter Jamaican Cranberries Salad
description: A tangy, fermented cabbage base tossed with dried cranberries, toasted coconut, and citrus for a crunchy, dairyfree mealprep delight.
instructions: Massage the shredded cabbage with sea salt, mustard seeds, thyme, and a pinch of black pepper until it releases liquid, then cover and let ferment at room temperature (≈20°C) for 24 hours.
Drain the excess liquid and rinse the cabbage lightly under cool water to reduce excess salt.
Combine the fermented cabbage, dried cranberries, toasted coconut, and grated ginger in a large bowl.
Whisk together lime juice, apple cider vinegar, and olive oil; pour over the cabbage mixture and toss until everything is evenly coated.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro and the remaining black pepper; give a gentle toss to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more lime juice or vinegar if desired.
Refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving, or serve at room temperature.
